question_data.Question: 다음 글의 주제로 가장 적절한 것은?
question_data.Paragraph: Coming up with a business strategy is oftentimes a lot easier than executing one. That's because properly executing a strategy requires everyone involved to fully understand it. While that might sound like common sense, it is typical to hear employees at every level of a company say things like, "Do we have a strategy? What's our strategy?" This is obviously a big problem. So, communicating your strategy clearly to your employees is essential. Be sure to avoid explaining it through a dull presentation, because this will leave your employees uninterested and confused. Instead, talk about your strategy in your own words and offer experiences to illustrate it. That way, you can highlight each individual's role, and nobody will be confused about what he or she should focus on. This method helps everyone to both understand the strategy and feel like an important part of it.
question_data.Options:
① 직원들에게 사업 전략을 효과적으로 전달하는 방법
② 성공적인 사업 전략을 수립하기 위한 핵심 요소
③ 기업의 조직 문화가 생산성에 미치는 영향
④ 직원 교육 프로그램의 효과와 한계
⑤ 경쟁 기업 분석의 중요성과 방법
question_data.Explanation:
① 직원들에게 사업 전략을 효과적으로 전달하는 방법
*해설: 전략 실행을 위해 직원들이 이해해야 하며, 따분한 발표 대신 자신의 언어와 경험으로 설명해야 한다는 것이 글의 핵심이다.

④ 이 방법은 전략을 이해하게만 돕고 참여감은 주지 않는다.
⑤ 전략 수립보다 실행이 항상 더 쉽다.
question_data.Explanation:
② 따분한 발표는 직원들을 혼란스럽게 만든다.
*해설: 'a dull presentation ... will leave your employees uninterested and confused'라고 명시되어 있다.

question_data.Question: 주어진 글 다음에 이어질 글의 순서로 가장 적절한 것은?
question_data.Paragraph:
Coming up with a business strategy is oftentimes a lot easier than executing one. That's because properly executing a strategy requires everyone involved to fully understand it.

(A) Instead, talk about your strategy in your own words and offer experiences to illustrate it. That way, you can highlight each individual's role, and nobody will be confused about what he or she should focus on.
(B) While that might sound like common sense, it is typical to hear employees at every level of a company say things like, "Do we have a strategy? What's our strategy?" This is obviously a big problem.
(C) So, communicating your strategy clearly to your employees is essential. Be sure to avoid explaining it through a dull presentation, because this will leave your employees uninterested and confused.
question_data.Explanation:
④ (B) - (C) - (A)
*해설: 도입(전략 이해 필요) → (B) 상식 같지만 직원들이 전략을 모르는 문제 → (C) 명확한 전달 필수, 따분한 발표 피하기 → (A) 대신 자기 말과 경험으로 설명하라 순서.

question_data.Question: 주어진 글 다음에 이어질 글의 순서로 가장 적절한 것은?
question_data.Paragraph:
Coming up with a business strategy is oftentimes a lot easier than executing one.

(A) So, communicating your strategy clearly to your employees is essential. Be sure to avoid explaining it through a dull presentation, because this will leave your employees uninterested and confused.
(B) Instead, talk about your strategy in your own words and offer experiences to illustrate it. This method helps everyone to both understand the strategy and feel like an important part of it.
(C) That's because properly executing a strategy requires everyone involved to fully understand it. While that might sound like common sense, it is typical to hear employees at every level of a company say things like, "Do we have a strategy?" This is obviously a big problem.
question_data.Explanation:
④ (C) - (A) - (B)
*해설: 도입(전략 수립 vs 실행) → (C) 실행에 이해 필요, 직원들이 모르는 문제 → (A) 명확 전달 필수, 따분한 발표 피하기 → (B) 자기 말과 경험으로, 이해와 참여감 순서.

question_data.Question: 주어진 글 다음에 이어질 글의 순서로 가장 적절한 것은?

While that might sound like common sense, it is typical to hear employees at every level of a company say things like, "Do we have a strategy? What's our strategy?"

(A) Instead, talk about your strategy in your own words and offer experiences to illustrate it. That way, you can highlight each individual's role.
(B) This is obviously a big problem. So, communicating your strategy clearly to your employees is essential.
(C) Be sure to avoid explaining it through a dull presentation, because this will leave your employees uninterested and confused.

④ ④
⑤ ⑤

②

question_data.Question: 다음 글의 밑줄 친 부분 중, 어법상 틀린 것은?
question_data.Paragraph: Coming up with a business strategy is oftentimes a lot easier than ①<u>executing</u> one. That's because properly executing a strategy requires everyone ②<u>involved</u> to fully understand it. While that might sound like common sense, it is typical ③<u>hearing</u> employees at every level of a company say things like, "Do we have a strategy?" So, communicating your strategy clearly to your employees is essential. Be sure to avoid ④<u>explaining</u> it through a dull presentation, because this will leave your employees ⑤<u>uninterested</u> and confused.
question_data.Options:
① ①
② ②
③ ③
④ ④
⑤ ⑤
question_data.Explanation:
③ hearing → to hear
*해설: 'It is typical to hear...'에서 가주어 It - 진주어 to부정사 구문이 올바른 형태이다. hearing(동명사)은 이 구조에서 부적절하다. 원문도 'it is typical to hear'이다.

question_data.Question: 다음 글의 내용을 한 문장으로 요약하고자 한다. 빈칸 (A), (B)에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
question_data.Paragraph:
Coming up with a business strategy is oftentimes a lot easier than executing one. That's because properly executing a strategy requires everyone involved to fully understand it. While that might sound like common sense, it is typical to hear employees at every level of a company say things like, "Do we have a strategy? What's our strategy?" This is obviously a big problem. So, communicating your strategy clearly to your employees is essential. Be sure to avoid explaining it through a dull presentation, because this will leave your employees uninterested and confused. Instead, talk about your strategy in your own words and offer experiences to illustrate it. That way, you can highlight each individual's role, and nobody will be confused about what he or she should focus on. This method helps everyone to both understand the strategy and feel like an important part of it.

→ To successfully ____(A)____ a business strategy, leaders must ____(B)____ it to employees through personal language and real experiences rather than boring presentations.
question_data.Options:
① (A) create - (B) conceal
② (A) execute - (B) communicate
③ (A) abandon - (B) delegate
④ (A) evaluate - (B) restrict
⑤ (A) fund - (B) advertise
question_data.Explanation:
② (A) execute - (B) communicate
*해설: 전략을 성공적으로 '실행(execute)'하려면, 따분한 발표 대신 개인적 언어와 경험을 통해 직원들에게 '전달(communicate)'해야 한다는 것이 글의 핵심이다.
